name: Simple Poem Creation Workflow
description: Two writers create a 2-paragraph poem, then an editor evaluates it

output.description: Editor's evaluation of the complete poem

steps.user_prompt:
Write a single paragraph poem (4-6 lines) about: {{task.input}}

Make it vivid and emotional. This will be the first paragraph of a two-paragraph poem.

Evaluate this 2-paragraph poem for:
1. Creativity and originality
2. Coherence between paragraphs
3. Emotional impact
4. Use of imagery and language

Poem:

{{artifacts.write-verse1}}

{{artifacts.write-verse2}}

Provide a thoughtful 2-3 sentence critique with specific observations.
